retention_probe.interpretation: First-epoch generator label decoded from the residual at each position. Chance (~0.5) before the reveal; ~1.0 once the indicator is in the input. In epoch >= 2 the label is neither in the current input nor predictively needed, so the retention accuracy (1.000) is the result: ~0.5 = discards predictively-useless identity (pure predictive sufficiency); near the upper bound = retains it (extra mechanistic memory).
